station.title: Student feedback layer
station.description: Student-facing root causes, recommendations, and feedback text.

metrics.adaptive_feedback:
=== ROOT CAUSES OF YOUR PERFORMANCE ===

Text Organization (Priority: MEDIUM)
Work on organizing your ideas clearly: Introduction (hook + thesis) -> Body (topic sentences + evidence) -> Conclusion (summary + reflection)

Time Management (Priority: HIGH)
You appear to have written under time pressure. Start assignments early to allow time for revision and improvement.

=== FOR YOUR PROFILE (Engaged but Weak Writers - Good effort, needs support) ===
Focus on consistent effort and reflection on your writing.

=== SPECIFIC ACTIONS YOU SHOULD TAKE ===
1. RECOMMEND_STRUCTURE_TRAINING: Focus on essay structure (intro/body/conclusion)
2. RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort

=== KEY INSIGHT ===
Your essay structure could be clearer.

=== RULE-BASED DIAGNOSTIC FEEDBACK ===
Excellent! Seeking assistance demonstrates awareness of your learning needs and a strong commitment to improvement.
Dialogic scaffolding

=== RECOMMENDED INTERVENTIONS ===
تقديم إثراء إضافي; جلسة حوار توضيحي; تشجيع وتعزيز السلوك الإيجابي
Clarification conference
مواد متقدمة وتحديات إضافية
تعزيز وإثراء
help_seeking_examples: Dear teacher I sincerely apologize for missing the submission deadline. I was extremely busy and unfortunately could not complete the work on time. I take full responsibility and assure you it will not happen again. I would be grateful if you could consider accepting my assignment despite the delay.
Miss i didn't use ai i use just academic vocabularies even the example in the the second body paragraph i took it from our class last week when using told them don't use ai
OKay miss thank you for the feedback. I will correct and revise the essay on my own and use my own words.
recommendations: RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort
